series_metadata.series_title: Office of General Services Data Center Time Billing Records
series_metadata.series_description: Reports and other records from Office of General Services detailing charges for use of the Office of General Services computer services including monthly billing reports, copies of vouchers and bills.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepencies are resolved, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepencies are resolved, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
